message.content:
@startuml skinparam sequenceDiagram participant web participant bff_web_api participant authorization_api participant k8s_redis web ->> bff_web_api: /api/v1/auth/token note over web, bff_web_api: Request header
Content-Type: application/json
Request body
- auth_code: xxxxxxx bff_web_api -> web: validate request note over bff_web_api, web: Request header
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Request body
- auth_code
note:
- handler late limit (brute force attack) bff_web_api -> authorization_api: /api/v1/oauth/token note over bff_web_api, authorization_api: Access token:
{
header:
- alg: rsa256
- typ: JWT
payload:
- iss
- jti
- user_id
- iat
- exp
- roles
signature
}
ttl: 300000 milliseconds (5 min)
Key: user_id:xxxxx
Redis object value:
- access_token
- refresh_token bff_web_api -> authorization_api: return note over bff_web_api, authorization_api: Response header
Content-Type: application/json
Response body
- accessToken
- RefreshToken authorization_api -> k8s_redis: check auth_code from k8s_redis k8s_redis -> authorization_api: return redis object note over k8s_redis: Key:
- auth_code
Redis object
- user_id
- scope authorization_api -> k8s_redis: put user session into k8s_redis k8s_redis -> authorization_api: save data authorization_api -> bff_web_api: generate JWT Token with private key bff_web_api -> authorization_api: return authorization_api -> web: return note over authorization_api, web: Response header
Content-Type: application/json
Response body
- accessToken
- RefreshToken k8s_redis..> authorization_api: validate request @enduml
